cautions: Curve pass increased avg CMC from 0 to 2.82.
warnings: Source deck lists 1 line(s) that appear outside Atraxa, Praetors' Voice's color identity (replacements may be needed).
List has 98 cards after validation; target is 100 for Commander.
results.summary: Transformed: Curve tightening. Power Casual, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~2.82.
results.why: This pass lowers the deck’s average mana cost by replacing expensive finishers, slow ramp, and basic-heavy mana with cheaper interaction, efficient draw, and faster fixing. [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]] benefits from landing earlier support pieces and protecting board development with low-cost spells. The land updates also improve color access while trimming slower fixing to better match a tightened casual curve.

raw.summary: Transformed: Curve tightening. Power Casual, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~2.82.
raw.plan: This pass lowers the deck’s average mana cost by replacing expensive finishers, slow ramp, and basic-heavy mana with cheaper interaction, efficient draw, and faster fixing. [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]] benefits from landing earlier support pieces and protecting board development with low-cost spells. The land updates also improve color access while trimming slower fixing to better match a tightened casual curve.
raw.why: This pass lowers the deck’s average mana cost by replacing expensive finishers, slow ramp, and basic-heavy mana with cheaper interaction, efficient draw, and faster fixing. [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]] benefits from landing earlier support pieces and protecting board development with low-cost spells. The land updates also improve color access while trimming slower fixing to better match a tightened casual curve.

added.arcane denial: [[Arcane Denial]] adds cheap interaction that protects your board while keeping mana open.
added.ashiok, dream render: [[Ashiok, Dream Render]] is a low-cost disruptive planeswalker that fits the leaner curve.
added.assassin's trophy: [[Assassin's Trophy]] gives efficient universal removal at two mana.
added.contentious plan: [[Contentious Plan]] is a cheap cantrip that also proliferates for [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]].
added.dovin's veto: [[Dovin's Veto]] provides reliable low-cost protection against noncreature spells.
added.experimental augury: [[Experimental Augury]] offers inexpensive card selection plus proliferate synergy.
added.fabled passage: [[Fabled Passage]] improves fixing without taking a spell slot at higher mana value.
added.fellwar stone: [[Fellwar Stone]] accelerates mana earlier than the removed three-mana rocks.
added.flooded strand: [[Flooded Strand]] upgrades mana consistency and finds needed colors efficiently.
added.indatha triome: [[Indatha Triome]] adds flexible three-color fixing in one land slot.
added.marsh flats: [[Marsh Flats]] improves color access and smooths early land development.
added.misty rainforest: [[Misty Rainforest]] helps assemble cleaner early mana for a four-color deck.
added.polluted delta: [[Polluted Delta]] increases fetch-based fixing and overall consistency.
added.serum visions: [[Serum Visions]] gives one-mana card smoothing to support a lower curve.
added.spara's headquarters: [[Spara's Headquarters]] provides broad fixing while supporting the updated mana base.
added.swan song: [[Swan Song]] is highly efficient protection for key turns and permanents.
added.talisman of curiosity: [[Talisman of Curiosity]] gives two-mana acceleration that is faster than sorcery ramp.
added.talisman of dominance: [[Talisman of Dominance]] adds efficient early ramp and color fixing.
added.talisman of progress: [[Talisman of Progress]] helps cast interactive spells sooner with low-cost ramp.
added.talisman of unity: [[Talisman of Unity]] supports faster multicolor development at two mana.
added.teferi, time raveler: [[Teferi, Time Raveler]] is a cheaper planeswalker that adds tempo and protection.
added.teferi's ageless insight: [[Teferi's Ageless Insight]] boosts draw output while costing less than top-end draw spells.
added.windswept heath: [[Windswept Heath]] improves fixing and complements the upgraded fetch package.
added.zagoth triome: [[Zagoth Triome]] adds another flexible tri-land to stabilize colors early.

removed.forest: Extra [[Forest]] copies were trimmed to make room for stronger multicolor fixing.
removed.island: Extra [[Island]] copies were cut as the mana base shifted toward fetches and dual-fixing lands.
removed.plains: Extra [[Plains]] copies were removed to support a more efficient four-color land base.
removed.swamp: Extra [[Swamp]] copies were trimmed for lands that fix multiple colors.
removed.blue sun's zenith: [[Blue Sun's Zenith]] is a mana-intensive draw spell that is clunky in a tighter curve.
removed.chromatic lantern: [[Chromatic Lantern]] was replaced by cheaper ramp to speed up early turns.
removed.commander's sphere: [[Commander's Sphere]] is slower than the new two-mana mana rocks.
removed.consecrated sphinx: [[Consecrated Sphinx]] is powerful but expensive for this curve-tightening pass.
removed.cultivate: [[Cultivate]] was cut for faster acceleration that comes down a turn earlier.
removed.dovin baan: [[Dovin Baan]] was removed as a slower planeswalker with less immediate impact.
removed.elspeth, sun's champion: [[Elspeth, Sun's Champion]] sits too high on the curve for this update.
removed.evolving wilds: [[Evolving Wilds]] was outclassed by stronger fixing upgrades.
removed.karn liberated: [[Karn Liberated]] is a costly top-end threat that does not support the lower curve plan.
removed.kodama's reach: [[Kodama's Reach]] was cut for cheaper ramp options that improve tempo.
removed.liliana vess: [[Liliana Vess]] is a five-mana planeswalker that is slow for the new build.
removed.nicol bolas, dragon-god: [[Nicol Bolas, Dragon-God]] was removed as an off-color card outside [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]]'s identity.
removed.nissa, who shakes the world: [[Nissa, Who Shakes the World]] is a higher-cost payoff that does not fit the tightened curve.
removed.pull from tomorrow: [[Pull from Tomorrow]] is another expensive X-draw spell that was streamlined out.
removed.rogue's passage: [[Rogue's Passage]] was cut because colorless utility lands strain a tighter four-color mana base.
removed.sorin, grim nemesis: [[Sorin, Grim Nemesis]] is a six-mana planeswalker that is too slow for this pass.
removed.stroke of genius: [[Stroke of Genius]] is a mana-hungry draw spell that slows the deck down.
removed.terramorphic expanse: [[Terramorphic Expanse]] was replaced by more efficient fixing lands.
removed.ugin, the spirit dragon: [[Ugin, the Spirit Dragon]] is powerful but far above the target curve.

warnings: Source deck lists 1 line(s) that appear outside Atraxa, Praetors' Voice's color identity (replacements may be needed).
List has 98 cards after validation; target is 100 for Commander.
Source deck lists 1 line(s) that appear outside Atraxa, Praetors' Voice's color identity (replacements may be needed).
results.summary: Transformed: Budget reduction. Power Casual, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~3.08.
results.why: This pass lowers total cost by replacing premium lands and high-price staples with cheaper fixing, scalable ramp, and straightforward proliferate support for [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]]. The changes keep the deck in a casual range while preserving counter synergies and smoothing mana on a moderate budget. It also replaces the off-color [[Nicol Bolas, Dragon-God]] with legal, budget-friendly options.

raw.summary: Transformed: Budget reduction. Power Casual, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~3.08.
raw.plan: This pass lowers total cost by replacing premium lands and high-price staples with cheaper fixing, scalable ramp, and straightforward proliferate support for [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]]. The changes keep the deck in a casual range while preserving counter synergies and smoothing mana on a moderate budget. It also replaces the off-color [[Nicol Bolas, Dragon-God]] with legal, budget-friendly options.
raw.why: This pass lowers total cost by replacing premium lands and high-price staples with cheaper fixing, scalable ramp, and straightforward proliferate support for [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]]. The changes keep the deck in a casual range while preserving counter synergies and smoothing mana on a moderate budget. It also replaces the off-color [[Nicol Bolas, Dragon-God]] with legal, budget-friendly options.

added.brushland: [[Brushland]] is a much cheaper dual land that still gives reliable green-white fixing.
added.adarkar wastes: [[Adarkar Wastes]] replaces pricier blue-white lands with efficient budget fixing.
added.arcane denial: [[Arcane Denial]] gives the deck a low-cost, flexible counterspell on budget.
added.ash barrens: [[Ash Barrens]] improves color access cheaply while still functioning as a land drop.
added.astral cornucopia: [[Astral Cornucopia]] ramps well with proliferate and fits the counters plan.
added.basri ket: [[Basri Ket]] adds budget planeswalker utility and makes +1/+1 counters for Atraxa to grow.
added.blossoming sands: [[Blossoming Sands]] is a simple low-cost replacement for expensive green-white fixing.
added.caves of koilos: [[Caves of Koilos]] provides untapped budget fixing for white and black.
added.contagion clasp: [[Contagion Clasp]] supplies removal plus repeatable proliferate at a low price.
added.contentious plan: [[Contentious Plan]] is an inexpensive way to draw a card and proliferate.
added.dismal backwater: [[Dismal Backwater]] is a budget blue-black dual that helps stabilize mana.
added.dovin's veto: [[Dovin's Veto]] is efficient, dependable interaction for a casual control shell.
added.drown in ichor: [[Drown in Ichor]] is affordable removal that also proliferates.
added.everflowing chalice: [[Everflowing Chalice]] scales nicely and becomes better with proliferate triggers.
added.experimental augury: [[Experimental Augury]] adds cheap card selection and another proliferate effect.
added.jiang yanggu, wildcrafter: [[Jiang Yanggu, Wildcrafter]] turns countered creatures into mana sources and supports the counter theme.
added.jungle hollow: [[Jungle Hollow]] is a low-cost black-green dual that keeps the mana base affordable.
added.kasmina, enigmatic mentor: [[Kasmina, Enigmatic Mentor]] offers budget planeswalker value and extra bodies to protect your board.
added.llanowar wastes: [[Llanowar Wastes]] is a cheap untapped source for green-black mana.
added.merciless eviction: [[Merciless Eviction]] gives the deck a versatile sweeper without premium pricing.
added.myriad landscape: [[Myriad Landscape]] is slow but useful budget ramp in a four-color mana base.
added.ob nixilis reignited: [[Ob Nixilis Reignited]] provides affordable card draw and removal on a planeswalker body.
added.painful truths: [[Painful Truths]] is efficient budget card draw in a multicolor deck.
added.path of ancestry: [[Path of Ancestry]] is strong budget fixing in Commander with incidental scry value.
added.pir, imaginative rascal: [[Pir, Imaginative Rascal]] boosts counter placement and directly supports Atraxa's game plan.
added.rampant growth: [[Rampant Growth]] is reliable budget land ramp that helps fix colors early.
added.scoured barrens: [[Scoured Barrens]] is a cheap white-black dual for a lower-cost mana base.
added.temple of deceit: [[Temple of Deceit]] trades speed for affordable fixing and useful scrying.
added.temple of mystery: [[Temple of Mystery]] is a budget-friendly dual that helps smooth draws.
added.temple of plenty: [[Temple of Plenty]] keeps green-white fixing inexpensive while adding scry value.
added.temple of silence: [[Temple of Silence]] is a low-cost dual that supports consistency on budget.
added.tezzeret's gambit: [[Tezzeret's Gambit]] draws cards and proliferates efficiently for this strategy.
added.thornwood falls: [[Thornwood Falls]] is a simple budget replacement for pricier blue-green lands.
added.tranquil cove: [[Tranquil Cove]] lowers mana-base cost while still covering blue-white needs.
added.underground river: [[Underground River]] offers untapped budget fixing for blue and black.
added.urban evolution: [[Urban Evolution]] is a budget value spell that draws cards and helps hit extra land drops.
added.yavimaya coast: [[Yavimaya Coast]] is a cheaper untapped source for green-blue mana.

removed.alchemist's refuge: [[Alchemist's Refuge]] is cut to lower cost and simplify the mana base.
removed.breeding pool: [[Breeding Pool]] is an expensive dual land replaced by cheaper fixing.
removed.chromatic lantern: [[Chromatic Lantern]] is useful but trimmed for less expensive ramp options.
removed.city of brass: [[City of Brass]] is efficient but costs more than needed for a casual budget build.
removed.consecrated sphinx: [[Consecrated Sphinx]] is a powerful staple that raises the deck's price significantly.
removed.cyclonic rift: [[Cyclonic Rift]] is removed mainly because it is a premium-priced staple.
removed.doubling season: [[Doubling Season]] is highly synergistic but too expensive for this budget pass.
removed.drowned catacomb: [[Drowned Catacomb]] is cut in favor of cheaper blue-black lands.
removed.gavony township: [[Gavony Township]] is replaced to keep the mana base cheaper and cleaner.
removed.glacial fortress: [[Glacial Fortress]] is trimmed as part of swapping to lower-cost fixing.
removed.godless shrine: [[Godless Shrine]] is a strong dual but too expensive for the new budget target.
removed.hallowed fountain: [[Hallowed Fountain]] is removed to reduce mana-base cost.
removed.hinterland harbor: [[Hinterland Harbor]] is replaced by more affordable green-blue sources.
removed.island: [[Island]] is cut to make room for more flexible budget color fixing.
removed.isolated chapel: [[Isolated Chapel]] is trimmed for cheaper white-black lands.
removed.jace, the mind sculptor: [[Jace, the Mind Sculptor]] is a premium planeswalker outside this budget goal.
removed.karn liberated: [[Karn Liberated]] is powerful but too costly for a casual budget revision.
removed.mana confluence: [[Mana Confluence]] is efficient fixing, but its price is unnecessary here.
removed.mystic remora: [[Mystic Remora]] is removed because it is a comparatively expensive draw staple.
removed.nicol bolas, dragon-god: [[Nicol Bolas, Dragon-God]] is outside [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]]'s color identity and must be removed.
removed.oko, thief of crowns: [[Oko, Thief of Crowns]] is a strong but expensive planeswalker for this pass.
removed.overgrown tomb: [[Overgrown Tomb]] is cut to replace premium fixing with cheaper options.
removed.phyrexian arena: [[Phyrexian Arena]] is serviceable, but lower-cost draw options reduce total price.
removed.reflecting pool: [[Reflecting Pool]] is removed to lower the cost of the mana base.
removed.reliquary tower: [[Reliquary Tower]] is cut because stronger color fixing matters more than no maximum hand size here.
removed.rhystic study: [[Rhystic Study]] is one of the deck's priciest staples and a clear budget cut.
removed.rogue's passage: [[Rogue's Passage]] is trimmed to prioritize colored sources and budget consistency.
removed.stroke of genius: [[Stroke of Genius]] is replaced by cheaper card-advantage options.
removed.sunpetal grove: [[Sunpetal Grove]] is cut as part of reducing land-base expense.
removed.sylvan library: [[Sylvan Library]] is a premium staple that does not fit the reduced budget.
removed.teferi, hero of dominaria: [[Teferi, Hero of Dominaria]] is removed to bring down both cost and overall card power.
removed.temple garden: [[Temple Garden]] is a premium land swapped for budget green-white fixing.
removed.tezzeret the seeker: [[Tezzeret the Seeker]] is cut because it is a pricier planeswalker than the budget target allows.
removed.the chain veil: [[The Chain Veil]] is removed to reduce cost and streamline the deck's planeswalker package.
removed.three visits: [[Three Visits]] is replaced by cheaper ramp that fills a similar role.
removed.toxic deluge: [[Toxic Deluge]] is an efficient sweeper but too expensive for this budget pass.
removed.ugin, the spirit dragon: [[Ugin, the Spirit Dragon]] is a high-cost finisher financially and strategically for casual budget play.
removed.watery grave: [[Watery Grave]] is removed to cut mana-base expense.
removed.woodland cemetery: [[Woodland Cemetery]] is replaced with more affordable black-green fixing.
